command:
echo '=== WP-5: 3060 identifies unsupported aider flags ==='
echo '' | base64 -d > /tmp/wp5.txt
curl -s -X POST http://192.168.0.106:11434/api/chat   -H 'Content-Type: application/json'   -d "$(python3 -c "
import json
prompt = open('/tmp/wp5.txt').read()
print(json.dumps({'model':'qwen3:8b','messages':[{'role':'user','content':prompt}],'stream':False,'options':{'temperature':0.1}}))
")" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
print('MODEL:', d.get('model'), 'EVAL:', d.get('eval_count'), 'in', round(d.get('total_duration',0)/1e9,1),'s')
print(d.get('message',{}).get('content',''))
" 2>&1

echo '=== ALSO: test each suspect flag individually ==='
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
AIDER=/home/jose/.local/bin/aider
for flag in "--no-fancy-input" "--no-notifications" "--no-detect-urls" "--disable-playwright" "--no-suggest-shell-commands" "--message-file /dev/null" "--env-file /dev/null"; do
  result=$($AIDER $flag --help 2>&1 | head -1)
  if echo "$result" | grep -q "unrecognized\|error\|invalid"; then
    echo "UNSUPPORTED: $flag"
  elif echo "$result" | grep -q "usage:"; then
    echo "USAGE_EXIT: $flag"
  else
    echo "OK: $flag"
  fi
done
' 2>&1

echo DONE_1968
